plugins.name: mol
plugins.description: Project workflow skills for molcrafts repos, organized around the plannerâ†’generatorâ†’evaluator harness pattern. 14 skills (spec, impl, litrev, arch, review, test, perf, docs, note, fix, debug, refactor, ship, web [v0.1.2]) + 14 single-axis agents. Adapts per project via mol_project frontmatter. Pair with mol-agent (harness lifecycle).

plugins.name: mol-agent
plugins.description: Per-project agent-harness lifecycle. /mol-agent:bootstrap installs CLAUDE.md + .agent/ + .claude/specs/ on first run. /mol-agent:update is the idempotent re-bootstrap (template refresh, frontmatter rescan, layout migration). /mol-agent:check audits presence + design-principles compliance.

plugins.name: mol-plugin
plugins.description: Maintenance toolkit for the molcrafts marketplace itself. /mol-plugin:new-skill scaffolds new skills, /mol-plugin:check is the marketplace's structural self-audit (parallel to /mol-agent:check for project harnesses), /mol-plugin:release bumps all plugins to a single shared version and tags v<X.Y.Z>.
